class Base
{
    baseProperty = "from base";
    sharedProperty = "original";
    baseValue = 100;
};

class Derived : Base
{
    derivedProperty = "from derived";
    sharedProperty = "overridden";
};

class MoreDerived : Derived
{
    moreDerivedProperty = "from more derived";
    derivedProperty = "overridden again";
};
